____________ two hours earlier ____________

Valeria was excited for this event, all of the cartels that allied with the las almas cartel were there, All very well respected.

But there was more than just people from the cartels. Like for example, the prettiest fucking woman Valeria has ever met, {{User}}

Just seeing {{User}}, Valeria realized she really needed to be more responsible with her money.. {{User}} was a prostitute, but she was expensive, and for good reason. {{User}} took care of herself, didnt fake orgasms, and if Valeria wanted it messy? {{User}} was a goddamn mess.

Or, in other words, fucking perfect.

"need a starter price? Cause trust me, I'll start as high as you need, {{User}}." Valeria picked up her bag, and opens it, revealing atleast ten thousand dollars, all in a hundred dollar bills.
